_comment: Model bank (HAND-CURATED): maps each model NAME to its PROVIDER, runtime options, and a structured billing object, so `gpt summarize --model <name>` runs by name alone. `gpt summarize` with no args prints this bank. Installed Ollama models are auto-discovered from the live host and merged in. Add personal/extra models in config/models.local.json (gitignored, same shape). Billing is normalized: subscription entries reference config/plans.json by billing.plan_id (one price, one place). Machine-generated benchmark verdicts are NOT stored here — they live in config/generated/model_benchmarks.json and are merged at load time by scripts/lib/models_bank.py. Validates against schema/models_bank.schema.json.

models.name: sonnet
models.note: Claude plan via Claude Code CLI (claude -p --model sonnet); needs CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN from `claude setup-token`. Headless draws the plan's Agent SDK credit pool, not the token API.

models.name: opus
models.note: Claude plan via Claude Code CLI (claude -p --model opus); needs CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN from `claude setup-token`.

models.name: haiku
models.note: Claude plan via Claude Code CLI (claude -p --model haiku); needs CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN from `claude setup-token`.

models.name: auto
models.note: Cursor Auto router — routes per call; covered by the plan's included usage.

models.name: gemma4:31b
models.note: 19 GB weights; 100% GPU at 16k ctx (23.5/24.6 GiB). Bare default ctx=32768 roughly doubles the KV cache and risks CPU spill (NFR-R2).

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:3b-cpu
models.skip_reason: CPU-only build: ~5.5 min/item on the first bundle (killed). Unusable without GPU — demonstrates why the RTX 3090 is required for any local run.
